events.label: assistant
events.text: I’ll write the required JSON directly. The key issue is that the gauge reading is unreadable and no alternate measurement is provided, so the condition cannot be accepted or failed from the evidence alone.

events.label: shell (exit 127)
events.text:
/bin/sh -lc "pwd && ls -la && cat > /app/answer.json <<'EOF'
{
  \"decision\": \"needs_more_info\",
  \"risk\": \"medium\",
  \"work_stage\": \"rough-complete\",
  \"component_conditions\": [],
  \"percent_complete\": 80,
  \"value\": 0,
  \"sound_source\": \"\",
  \"confidence\": 0.86,
  \"event_time\": 0.0,
  \"rate\": 0.0,
  \"order\": [],
  \"workable\": [],
  \"findings\": [
    \"Gauge needle and scale are out of focus, so the measured value cannot be read or verified.\",
    \"Referenced work-order limit cannot be compared to any readable field value.\",
    \"NEC Article 392 compliance for the cable tray condition cannot be confirmed from the provided evidence.\"
  ],
  \"actions\": [
    \"Obtain a clear gauge photo or repeat the measurement with the scale and needle readable.\",
    \"Record the applicable work-order limit and the measured value in the inspection record.\",
    \"Hold final acceptance of this cable tray check until the measurement is verified against NEC Article 392 and project requirements.\"
  ],
  \"rationale\": \"The cable tray appears to be at rough-complete stage, but the only measurement evidence is unreadable and no second measurement is available. Because the actual value and limit comparison cannot be verified, the appropriate disposition is needs_more_info rather than pass or fail.\",
  \"references\": [
    \"NEC Article 392\",
    \"Project work order measurement limit\"
  ]
}
EOF
jq . /app/answer.json"
→ /app
